title: Eplingiella cuniloides
taxonomy: Eplingiella cuniloides belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant is native to South America and is a member of the genus Eplingiella. The classification of Eplingiella cuniloides is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Boraginales, family Boraginaceae, genus Eplingiella, species E. cuniloides. Eplingiella cuniloides is closely related to other species within the family Boraginaceae, which includes plants such as forget-me-nots and borage. The classification of Eplingiella cuniloides is a key factor in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
